home.description: Full Stack Developer passionate about creating innovative technological solutions, with experience in modern architectures, microservices and performance optimization
home.aboutDescription: Software engineer with over 3 years of experience creating modern web and mobile applications. Specialized in microservices architectures, full stack development and cloud solutions. I've worked with technologies like Spring Boot, Angular, Node.js, Flutter and Azure, optimizing financial systems, social platforms and enterprise applications. I'm passionate about solving complex problems and turning ideas into digital products that make a positive impact.

python.title: Databases and SQL for Data Science with Python

odoo.title: Odoo 16/17 Technical Course

fullstack.title: Angular & Spring Boot: Full Stack
fullstack.description: Angular 17 (components, routes, services, Redux) | Spring Boot 3 (Spring Security, JWT, JPA/Hibernate) | Implementation of solutions like real-time chat (WebSocket) | Shopping carts and CRUD with RESTful APIs | Integrating pagination and advanced state management | Deployment on AWS (EC2, RDS, S3) following optimal security and performance practices.
